description_long: This cowshed is a single-story rectangular structure with a low-pitched, shed-style roof finished in a light gray material. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic and functional appearance. The front facade features a single wooden door and a set of two-pane windows, while the side view reveals another window, providing natural light to the interior. The rear and one side of the building are windowless, emphasizing its utilitarian design. The wood is light in color, and the overall construction appears sturdy and weather-resistant. The roof slightly overhangs the walls, offering some protection from rain and sun.
description: A rectangular, single-story wooden cowshed with a light gray shed roof, front door, and windows, designed in a rustic utilitarian style.
description_view_0: The view shows a plain wooden wall with vertical support beams and no windows or doors, likely the rear of the cowshed.
description_view_1: This side view displays a horizontal wooden wall with a single two-pane window, providing light to the interior.
description_view_2: The rear view features a solid wooden wall with no openings, emphasizing the building's enclosed nature.
description_view_3: The front view reveals the main entrance with a single wooden door and a set of two-pane windows, indicating the primary access point.
attribute_door_style: single wooden plank door with vertical panels
attribute_window_presence: two rectangular two-pane windows, one on the front and one on the side
